legend_symbols.means: DGPO Double General Purpose Outlet (fit for purpose as noted) (AB) Above Bench, (UB) Under Bench, (SK) Skirting
GPO Single General Purpose Outlet (fit for purpose as noted)
Data CAT6 (fit to purpose as noted)
Speakers - Fitstop standard, black (B) or white (W) finish, qty 4x
General LED Panels (Osram Ledvance LED Panel, 32W 4000K, 1200x300mm)
Feature Recessed LED Downlight (Aurora Tritone 410mm, IP44, 4000K)
Feature Recessed LED Downlight @ Mirrors (Aurora Tritone 410mm, IP44)
Switch with dimmer if noted (fit for purpose as noted)
Fans (wall mounted) - Renegade Industrial Fan, Reonfan 2x speed, IP44, black
Air Conditioning Square Ceiling Diffuser to mech engineer spec, black
Air Conditioning Return Air Grille to mech engineer spec
Mechanical Exhaust Ventilation Registers (fit for purpose, comply AS1668)

items.note: Includes AB/UB/SK variants plus reception desk dual DGPO+USB and TV/clock DGPOs; many labelled but dense/overlapping - count approximate
Several GPO tags around perimeter and reception; small/illegible at this resolution
Data points near reception/comms cupboard; main data point to modem noted in reception requirements
Existing EDB - upgrade as required, top-left near stair/storage
Legend states qty 4x; visible at perimeter walls and reception
Main floor lighting on RCP - dense grid, count approximate
Throughout floor and amenities; RCP dense
EXIT signs noted 'only if required by certifier' - locations near stair/entry
C.O.S. - exact count unclear on RCP
Power for LED neon sign, shopfront signage (timer in EDB), HMU, fountain power, water cooler/fridge - called up as text, fit for purpose; no 15A symbol defined in legend

overall_note: Two relevant sheets: 104A (Power & Data) and 103A (RCP/lighting). Legends are clear but the plan symbols are small and low-resolution at this scale, and many power/data points are tagged by text notes rather than discrete countable symbols (e.g. 'power for neon sign', 'fountain power', 'power for shopfront signage'). Reception area requirements describe additional outlets (2x dual DGPO w/USB, 2x iPad power, 5x port switch, data to modem) that may not all appear as distinct symbols. The legend defines NO dedicated 15A circuit symbol; dedicated/appliance points are noted as text only. Light fitting counts from the RCP are approximate due to dense ceiling grid overlapping with A/C diffusers and structural elements. All counts marked low confidence should be field-verified against the full-resolution PDF.
